_meta.maps_to: M-26-14 Appendix C Data Retention Level 2 (Intermediate): retrievable >= 365 days
_meta.notes: Phase min_age values are measured from rollover. With a 30d rollover cap, total retention lands at 365-395 days. Note: this policy implements an interim maturity-ramp state (~30-60 days searchable); the M-26-14 Appendix B baseline end-state is 6 months actively searchable / 12 months retrievable (the L4 posture, or the documented L3 frozen min_age edit). Plan the ramp to the baseline, not to this policy. See docs/COMPAT.md. The snapshot_repository default 'found-snapshots' is Elastic Cloud Hosted's built-in repo; on ECE/self-managed, register a repository and change that value here before applying. See docs/COMPAT.md.
